name: Depth Recurrence 4Lx3Loop + LoRA32 + BigramHash + SWA on 1xH100 (20min)
blurb: Depth recurrence with 4 shared layers looped 3x (12 effective depth), per-loop LoRA rank 32 + level signals. 11.6M params, mixed int5/int6 QAT, BigramHash 10240, SWA frac=0.4, WD=0.04. 1xH100 20min, single seed, val_bpb=1.3752. Artifact only 8.3MB (7.7MB headroom under 16MB cap).
author: henrycashe26
